plant-growth::choice_or_mode.issue: Actionable open: Mode choices need first-class mode/option fields when a spell exposes several distinct operations.
plant-growth::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a choice/mode bucket with option-specific targets/effects.
plant-growth::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing Utility Options or descriptions until mode schema propagation.

plant-growth::created_object_or_structur.issue: Actionable open: Created structures, wards, huts, mounts, or servants need durable object/entity fields.
plant-growth::created_object_or_structur.recommendedJsonChange: Use current summon/utility/terrain data as interim representation.

plant-growth::resource_or_consumption.issue: Actionable open: Costs, spell storage, triggers, or resources need non-component resource fields.
plant-growth::resource_or_consumption.recommendedJsonChange: Use current component/utility fields as interim data.

plant-growth::environmental_change.issue: Actionable open: Environmental changes need reusable world-state fields for weather, obscurement, growth, gas, liquids, and hazards.
plant-growth::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/damage/utility fields as interim data.

protection-from-energy::choice_or_mode.issue: Actionable open: Mode choices need first-class mode/option fields when a spell exposes several distinct operations.
protection-from-energy::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a choice/mode bucket with option-specific targets/effects.
protection-from-energy::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing Utility Options or descriptions until mode schema propagation.

protection-from-energy::damage_reduction.issue: Actionable open: Damage prevention/reduction needs explicit reducibility and prevention fields.
protection-from-energy::damage_reduction.recommendedJsonChange: Use defensive/utility effects as interim representation.
protection-from-energy::damage_reduction.reviewerNote: Closed by the specific Protection from Energy manual row: the chosen resistance is now represented by DEFENSIVE resistance plus damageTypeSource chosen_damage_type.

protection-from-energy::environmental_ch.issue: Closed residual duplicate: a manual review row already resolved this finding as represented, wrong-bucket, or tracked under a more specific open bucket. No mechanic is being discarded by closing this generic residual row.
protection-from-energy::environmental_ch.recommendedTemplateChange: No template change required from this residual duplicate.
protection-from-energy::environmental_ch.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change required from this residual duplicate.

remove-curse::conditional_ending.issue: The residual detector put curse removal and cursed-item attunement branching in conditional_ending, but this is restoration/curse-effect logic, not an early-ending trigger. The manual Remove Curse row remains open for curseRemoval and attunement-break fields.
remove-curse::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No conditional-ending field needed for this residual row; preserve the manual curse-removal row.
remove-curse::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No conditionalEndings JSON entry needed for this residual row.

sending::message_or_communication.issue: Actionable open: Communication rules need sender/recipient, language, plane, and message-shape fields.
sending::message_or_communication.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing Utility Options as interim data.

sending::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Closed: Reviewed in the level-3 residual sweep; travel_or_planar_movement is either already represented or covered by a separately open schema bucket.
sending::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required from this residual row.
sending::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change required from this residual row.

sending::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Actionable open: Knowledge, attitude, speech, or memory effects need explicit social/knowledge fields.
sending::social_or_knowledge_effect.recommendedJsonChange: Use current status/utility text as interim representation.

sending::conditional_ending.issue: Sending's cross-plane delivery chance and recipient block/failure state are communication delivery mechanics, not early-ending triggers. The manual Sending row remains open for delivery failure and block-state fields.
sending::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No conditional-ending field needed for this residual row; preserve the manual communication delivery row.
sending::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No conditionalEndings JSON entry needed for this residual row.

sleet-storm::choice_or_mode.issue: Closed residual duplicate: a manual review row already resolved this finding as represented, wrong-bucket, or tracked under a more specific open bucket. No mechanic is being discarded by closing this generic residual row.
sleet-storm::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No template change required from this residual duplicate.
sleet-storm::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change required from this residual duplicate.

sleet-storm::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Closed: Reviewed in the level-3 residual sweep; attack_or_save_modifier is already covered by current save, attack, target, filter, or prompt fields where this row applies.
sleet-storm::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field required from this residual row.
sleet-storm::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON change required from this residual row.

sleet-storm::terrain_or_surface.issue: Actionable open: Terrain/surface rules need stronger terrain, surface, passability, and environmental-state fields when not already covered by TERRAIN.
sleet-storm::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/utility representation as interim data.

sleet-storm::ward_alarm_or_trigger.issue: Actionable open: Wards, glyph triggers, and delayed triggered effects need trigger-condition and stored-effect fields.
sleet-storm::ward_alarm_or_trigger.recommendedJsonChange: Use current Utility Options as interim data.

sleet-storm::healing_or_restoration.issue: Actionable open: Healing, restoration, transfer, or condition removal needs specific restoration/prevention fields beyond generic utility.
sleet-storm::healing_or_restoration.recommendedJsonChange: Use current HEALING/UTILITY effects until propagation.

sleet-storm::status_or_state_change.issue: Actionable open: Some state changes are not simple D&D conditions and need state-change fields.
sleet-storm::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add state-change bucket fields for non-condition states.
sleet-storm::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Use STATUS_CONDITION where possible and Utility Options elsewhere.

sleet-storm::environmental_change.issue: Actionable open: Environmental changes need reusable world-state fields for weather, obscurement, growth, gas, liquids, and hazards.
sleet-storm::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/damage/utility fields as interim data.

sleet-storm::conditional_ending.issue: The phrase 'until the spell ends' is ordinary duration scoping for the storm area, not an early-ending trigger. Environmental and area-trigger mechanics remain tracked in their own buckets.
sleet-storm::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No conditional-ending field needed for this residual row.
sleet-storm::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: No conditionalEndings JSON entry needed for this residual row.
